prompt:
Ultra-premium 3D render of a stylized multi-level sales funnel, centered on pure black background (#000000). Aspect ratio 9:16 portrait. Cinema4D / Octane render quality.

SUBJECT:
One vertical 3D funnel composed of 4 STACKED HORIZONTAL BANDS/LEVELS, each a different brand color. Shown from a slight 3/4 perspective (~12° down angle) so the elliptical top rim and each band's thickness are visible, but the front face of each band reads as nearly flat and wide for text placement.

The funnel has the classic sales-funnel silhouette: widest at the top, stepping narrower at each band boundary, tapering to a cylindrical spout at the bottom. Each band is a distinct 3D ring segment with visible thickness on top and bottom edges. The bands stack like a layered cake, each slightly narrower than the one above.

The funnel occupies approximately 80% of canvas width at the widest (top) and 85% of canvas height total.

BAND COLORS (from top to bottom, each level distinct):
1. TOP BAND (widest, ~25% of total height): MM Agency violet (#713DFF) — glossy polished plastic, bright lilac (#C8A4FF) specular highlights on upper-left
2. SECOND BAND (~22% of total height, narrower): vibrant orange (#F54900) — same glossy plastic finish, warm highlights
3. THIRD BAND (~20% of total height, narrower still): electric cyan (#00E3FF) — glossy plastic, cool highlights
4. FOURTH BAND / SPOUT TOP (~18% of total height, narrowest main band): bright yellow (#FAFA00) — glossy plastic, warm-white highlights
5. Below the 4th band: a short cylindrical spout (~15% of height) in deep violet (#2E1A6B) — the outflow point

TEXT INTEGRATED INTO EACH BAND:
Each band has a BOLD WHITE SANS-SERIF LABEL written directly on its front face, perfectly legible, Montserrat ExtraBold or similar. The text wraps horizontally across each band, centered:
- Band 1 (violet, top): "ATRAEMOS AL CLIENTE IDEAL"
- Band 2 (orange): "CAPTURAMOS EL CONTACTO"
- Band 3 (cyan): "CALIFICAMOS EN SEGUNDOS"
- Band 4 (yellow): "CERRAMOS LA VENTA" (text in dark violet #2E1A6B on yellow for contrast)

Text is crisp, perfectly spelled in Spanish, sized to fit each band's width comfortably (~60% of band width), uppercase, bold, slight letter-spacing. All 4 labels perfectly aligned and centered on their bands. No warping, no distortion.

MATERIAL & LIGHTING:
- All bands: glossy polished plastic, NOT metallic, NOT glass
- Three-point studio lighting: key upper-left (warm white), fill front (soft), rim upper-right-back (cool)
- Each band has a clear specular highlight strip on its upper curve
- Subtle ambient occlusion where bands meet (dark seams between colors)
- Soft contact shadow below the spout on the black background (very subtle, ~20% opacity halo)

STYLE:
- Clean premium 3D marketing asset — think Stripe, Linear, Apple product page hero
- Bold and iconic, slightly stylized proportions for visual impact
- NOT photorealistic kitchen object, NOT cartoon, NOT flat 2D design
- Everything tack sharp, no DOF blur, no noise

NO additional elements: no spheres above, no arrows, no extra labels, no logos, no decorative particles, no liquid, no hands, no people. Just ONE solitary 4-level funnel on pure black.
negative_prompt: misspelled text, warped text, blurry text, distorted letters, additional labels, arrows, spheres above, tubes above funnel, liquid, droplets, particles, multiple funnels, duplicate objects, transparent, glass, crystal, chrome, mirror, metallic, gold, silver, photorealistic kitchen scene, hands, people, human figures, cartoon, flat design, 2D illustration, vector art, wireframe, low poly, noise, grain, out of focus, rainbow gradients, pastel colors, muted colors, gradient background, white background, gray background, colored background, room, floor, table, surface, watermarks, signatures

settings.style: premium 3D funnel product render, 4 color bands with integrated text
settings.lighting: three-point studio: key upper-left, fill front, rim upper-right-back
settings.quality: ray-traced, clean glossy plastic surfaces, crisp integrated text
